channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Commencement Important Dates and Details
item.description: On Monday, April 27th important dates and items were sent out to all registered graduates attending commencement. Keep an eye out for all communications as graduation day approaches!
item.author: Students

item.title: Register for RPI’s Lavender Graduation
item.description: Join us in celebrating Rensselaer students of the LGBTQ+ community at Lavender Graduation! This is sure to be an inclusive and celebratory experience. We look forward to acknowledging your accomplishments and evolutions into college graduates of Rensselaer. Business casual recommended but come as you feel comfortable. Graduating students who wish to be recognized must register at the linked attached by Sunday, May 10. For Questions, email the LGBTQ+ Task Force at lgbtqtaskforce@rpi.edu.
item.author: Students

item.title: Register for RPI’s Intercultural Celebration on May 12!
item.description: Join us at the Intercultural Celebration, as part of RPI’s Graduating Student Week, this casual events recognizes and honors the achievements, experiences, and contributions of graduating students from a wide range of identities and backgrounds within the RPI community. Graduating students are invited to join this celebration to reflect on their journeys, connect with peers with Graduation Cap Decorating, Hors d’oeuvres, music, games, and Photo Ops with our RPI Banner! Register today!
item.author: Students

item.title: Finals Week Dining Hours of Operations
item.description: As finals week kicks off, please click the link above for retail and dining hours of operations across campus from May 4th through May 8th. Be sure to plan ahead! Good luck on Finals!
item.author: Students

item.title: Summer 2026 Meal Plan Announcement
item.description: For Summer 2026, only Block Plans will be offered. These plans are available to students living on or off campus during the summer semester. Students who will be back living on campus for Fall 2026 are required to enroll in a residential meal plan for that semester. Additionally, Student and Community RAD may be used at all campus dining and retail locations. For more information please click the link above or email auxiliaryservices@rpi.edu with any questions.
item.author: Community

item.title: Retail and Dining Hours of Operations: Spring to Summer Transition
item.description: As we wrap up the Spring 2026 semester and prepare for the Summer 2026 term, the hours of operations for retail and dining hall locations on campus will be adjusted. Please click the link above for full details. We thank you and look forward to serving you this summer.
item.author: Community

item.title: SUMMER PARKING PERMITS NOW AVAILABLE
item.description: Summer 26’ parking permits are now available. Please visit rpi.aimsparking.com to purchase. Any questions please reach out to parking and transportation
item.author: Community

item.title: 2026 Awardees of the Teaching and Learning Collaboratory Seed Projects
item.description: The Undergraduate Department and the Teaching and Learning Collaboratory are excited to announce the winners of the 2026 seed project call.
item.author: Community

item.title: Division of Human Resources Workshop: RPI MAX for Supervisors: Performance and Coaching - May 14, 2026 - 2PM-4PM
item.description:
Date: Thursday, May 14, 2026 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM - As a manager, you play a central role in guiding the performance process for your employees—working collaboratively to align expectations, support development, and monitor progress toward achieving goals. This workshop introduces the core principles of performance coaching, including how to identify and evaluate performance gaps, set effective goals, and lead the RPI MAX performance process. Participants will also explore practical tools for…

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
